key_findings.orthad_growth: Corrected (BQ)^6 L advances Fibonacci/Farey q by six B steps per lap; uv growth ratio tends to phi^12; sign/channel pattern alternates by lap with period 2.
key_findings.ancient_yi_growth: Ancient Yi LSD-first octal place domains complete at 8^k-1 and open a new high place; capacity growth is exactly x8 per place.
key_findings.bridge: Both are retained-state cycle systems with multiplicative capacity growth and lift/carry after completion, but use different refinement arithmetic.
key_findings.wilhelm_line_ladder: Line-position semantics are not flat bits: line 3 peaks danger/transition; line 6 peaks threshold/excess and return/carry pressure; line 1 peaks hidden/admission and constraint.
key_findings.modular_b: B should be tested as an operator schema whose refinement arithmetic can be carrier/domain selected, not as only the canonical origin Fibonacci/Farey path.

objective_open_pieces: Latest Phase selector/floor source from HDD to test current canonical B admissibility law.
Ancient Yi full translation and line-order convention for all tables.
Dongyuan/Ceyuan formula-state graph to test non-place-value position-governed refinement.
Formal modular-B test suite over arbitrary seeds and base-N/place/refinement families.
Liu 2022 data for topology/QSL/current/reconnection time series.
